provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi industrial, visible material texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, centered on plain dark grey background, regulation Compact cargo container with rectangular profile and stamped steel blue panels, standard locking mechanism, barcode label and destination stamp, magnetic clamp mounting points on top and sides, scuffed corners from loading cycles, stenciled weight class and hazmat classification, intermodal shipping container for space
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, glamorous, people, characters, figures, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Cargo/container with faction-specific construction, labeling, and wear.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
